title: senecio sulinicus
intro: Senecio sulinicus, also known as the "Ragwort", is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio sulinicus are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Ragwort due to its toxic properties.
